creator: nobu@rd.isac.co.jp
text:
following source distribution version up.

Fix: 

please remove patches/patch-ab, This change merge to original source.--Wo7g6gNtVOfPzMlK6M5WHr17BqlbsyWipwbd9wV7equ3JxJX
Content-Type: text/plain; name="file.diff"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="file.diff"

diff -ru fd.orig/Makefile fd/Makefile
--- fd.orig/Makefile	Wed Aug 25 19:19:47 1999
+++ fd/Makefile	Mon Sep  6 11:27:03 1999
@@ -6,8 +6,8 @@
 # $FreeBSD: ports/misc/fd/Makefile,v 1.14 1999/08/25 07:21:37 obrien Exp $
 #
 
-DISTNAME=	FD-1.03j
-PKGNAME=	fd-1.03j
+DISTNAME=	FD-1.03k
+PKGNAME=	fd-1.03k
 CATEGORIES=	misc
 MASTER_SITES=	ftp://ftp.ics.es.osaka-u.ac.jp/pub/FDclone/
 
diff -ru fd.orig/files/md5 fd/files/md5
--- fd.orig/files/md5	Thu Mar 18 08:34:10 1999
+++ fd/files/md5	Wed Sep  1 14:23:46 1999
@@ -1 +1 @@
-MD5 (FD-1.03j.tar.gz) = afb06e4b28e627fe559ba38efa728b2d
+MD5 (FD-1.03k.tar.gz) = 17a82e75d72153512500274c7ca75d10
Only in fd.orig/patches: patch-ab
